channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: The star-studded World Cup semifinals kick off with France vs. Spain
item.description: The expanded World Cup allowed FIFA to introduce a new seeding system that placed the world's top teams in opposite corners of the knockout bracket. Now, the semifinals are both heavyweight matchups.
item.content:encoded:
The expanded World Cup allowed FIFA to introduce a new seeding system that placed the world's top teams in opposite corners of the knockout bracket. Now, the semifinals are both heavyweight matchups.

(Image credit: Florencia Tan Jun, Molly Darlington, Richard Pelham, David Ramos)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: Man shot to death by ICE agent in southern Maine
item.description: A Colombian man was fatally shot by an ICE agent this morning in Biddeford, Maine. Sen. Angus King says he was told the man had "weaponized" his vehicle when the shooting occurred.
item.content:encoded: A Colombian man was fatally shot by an ICE agent this morning in Biddeford, Maine. Sen. Angus King says he was told the man had "weaponized" his vehicle when the shooting occurred.
item.dc:creator: Ari Snider

item.title: Residents of historic North Nashville see redistricting as a new attempt at division
item.description: The redistricting carried out by Tennessee lawmakers divides a community of Black voters along the same line as highway split them up 60 years ago and they say it weakens their power once again.
item.content:encoded: The redistricting carried out by Tennessee lawmakers divides a community of Black voters along the same line as highway split them up 60 years ago and they say it weakens their power once again.
item.dc:creator: Marianna Bacallao

item.title: Houston community holds vigil for man killed by ICE agents
item.description: A mix of grief and outrage was on display over the weekend at a vigil for Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, who was fatally shot in Houston by ICE agents.
item.content:encoded: A mix of grief and outrage was on display over the weekend at a vigil for Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, who was fatally shot in Houston by ICE agents.
item.dc:creator: Bianca Seward

item.title: A guard punched him on camera. It was still nearly impossible for him to sue
item.description: Prisoners are allowed to file complaints about mistreatment — but doing so often comes with retaliation. That's according to an investigation by NPR and The Marshall Project.
item.content:encoded: Prisoners are allowed to file complaints about mistreatment — but doing so often comes with retaliation. That's according to an investigation by NPR and The Marshall Project.
item.dc:creator: Christie Thompson

item.title: He was having a mental health crisis. Memphis task force agents came and shot him
item.description: Jonah Neal, 25, was struck by a Homeland Security Investigations agent in May. There have been at least four deadly shootings related to the task force.
item.content:encoded:
Jonah Neal, 25, was struck by a Homeland Security Investigations agent in May. There have been at least four deadly shootings related to the task force.

(Image credit: Luke Sharrett for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Juliana Kim

item.title: Red Cross declares national blood emergency as supplies dwindle and demand surges
item.description: The American Red Cross is declaring a national blood emergency because blood supplies fell 25% in June and demand for blood surged.
item.content:encoded: The American Red Cross is declaring a national blood emergency because blood supplies fell 25% in June and demand for blood surged.
item.dc:creator: Rob Stein

item.title: Want to own a real T. rex? It could cost you $30 million
item.description: The Tyrannosaurus rex fossil known as "Gus" will go up for auction on Tuesday. It's not the first time dinosaur bones have been sold to the highest bidder.
item.content:encoded:
The Tyrannosaurus rex fossil known as "Gus" will go up for auction on Tuesday. It's not the first time dinosaur bones have been sold to the highest bidder.

(Image credit: Timothy A. Clary)
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster

item.title: Georgia's unique in the American Revolution told through its historical markers
item.description: NPR's Don Gonyea speaks with Andrew Iden, Executive Producer of Marked!: The Podcast, which examines Georgia's role in America's revolutionary period through the 2,000 roadside historical marker.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Don Gonyea speaks with Andrew Iden, Executive Producer of Marked!: The Podcast, which examines Georgia's role in America's revolutionary period through the 2,000 roadside historical marker.
item.dc:creator: Don Gonyea

item.title: Airline consolidation now rules the skies. Has it been good for passengers?
item.description: The four biggest U.S. airlines control an unprecedented 75% of the market. The industry's critics say consolidation is bad for passengers, but the airlines insist there's still healthy competition.
item.content:encoded: The four biggest U.S. airlines control an unprecedented 75% of the market. The industry's critics say consolidation is bad for passengers, but the airlines insist there's still healthy competition.
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose
